popup_addtriggerhint: Add a point to the track which will activate when the train passes.
popup_cannotopen: Cannot open as the ride is untested and the checklist is incomplete
popup_cannotopen_incomplete: Cannot open as the checklist is incomplete
popup_cannotopen_need2stations: Cannot open as transport rides need at least 2 stations.
popup_cannotopen_nocircuit: Cannot open as the track is not a circuit
popup_cannotopen_nostations: Cannot open as there are no complete stations
popup_cannotopen_racing: Cannot open as the track is not a circuit and the checklist is incomplete
popup_cannotopen_station: Cannot open as the station is untested
popup_cannotopen_untested: Cannot open as the ride is untested
popup_cannottest_noendloops: Cannot test as the ride is missing a Drive Station Wheel and a Bull Wheel Cap
popup_cannottest_nostations: Cannot test as there are no stations built
popup_coastertriggerdescription: Place triggers along the track and attach them to animated scenery
popup_multiselect_blueprinttoomanyflatri: Blueprints cannot contain more than 5 amusement rides.
Blueprints cannot contain more than {VALUE:int} flat rides.
popup_multiselect_blueprinttoomanyprops: Blueprints cannot contain more than 4000 scenery/building pieces.
popup_multiselect_blueprinttoomanyprops_: Blueprints cannot contain more than {VALUE:int} scenery pieces.
popup_multiselect_blueprinttoomanyrides: Blueprints cannot contain more than 5 rides.
popup_multiselect_blueprinttoomanyrides_: Blueprints cannot contain more than {VALUE:int} rides.
popup_multiselect_blueprinttoomanytracke: Blueprints cannot contain more than 5 coasters, tracked rides, or flumes.
Blueprints cannot contain more than {VALUE:int} coasters, tracked rides, or flumes.
popup_multiselect_blueprinttoomanyvolume: Blueprints cannot contain more than {VALUE:int} path/pool sections.
popup_multiselect_buildingmerge_toobig: Cannot Add scenery to create a building with more than 5000 scenery/building pieces.
popup_multiselect_buildingmerge_toobig_v: Cannot add scenery to create a building with more than {VALUE:int} scenery/building pieces.
popup_multiselect_buildingsplit_toobig: Cannot ungroup scenery with more than 5000 scenery pieces selected.
popup_multiselect_buildingsplit_toobig_v: Cannot ungroup scenery with more than {VALUE:int} scenery pieces selected.
popup_multiselect_duellingcoasters_coast: Up to 5 coasters can be linked together.
popup_multiselect_duellingcoasters_confi: Cannot have more than {MAX:separatedFloat:decimalPlaces=0} coasters in a chain.
popup_multiselect_duellingcoasters_descr: Use the Multi-Select tool to add Coasters to your Coaster Chain.
popup_multiselect_duellingcoasters_numse: Drag or click to select Coasters you want to Chain together.
popup_multiselect_edittoomanyflatrides: Cannot move/delete more than 5 amusement rides at a time.
popup_multiselect_edittoomanyflatrides_v: Cannot move/delete more than {VALUE:int} flat rides at a time.
popup_multiselect_edittoomanyprops: Cannot move/delete more than 5000 scenery/building pieces at a time.
popup_multiselect_edittoomanyprops_varia: Cannot move/delete more than {VALUE:int} scenery pieces at a time.
popup_multiselect_edittoomanyrides: Cannot move/delete more than 5 rides at a time.
popup_multiselect_edittoomanyrides_varia: Cannot move/delete more than {VALUE:int} rides at a time.
popup_multiselect_edittoomanytrackedride: Cannot move/delete more than 5 coasters at a time.
Cannot move/delete more than {VALUE:int} coasters, tracked rides, or flumes at a time.
popup_multiselect_edittoomanyvolumes_var: Cannot move/delete more than {VALUE:int} path/pool sections at a time.
popup_multiselect_patrolzones_descriptio:
Multi-Select to define priority attractions and facilities to be assigned to staff members.

Mechanics will only interact with the selected rides if assigned to this.
Vendors will only try to work in the selected shops if assigned to this.
All staff members will prefer to use selected staff buildings but will look elsewhere if they are full.
All staff will use everything selected as places to patrol to while walking.
popup_multiselect_recolourtoomanyflatrid: Cannot change colours for more than {VALUE:int} flat rides at a time.
popup_multiselect_recolourtoomanyprops_v: Cannot change colours for more than {VALUE:int} scenery pieces at a time.
popup_multiselect_recolourtoomanyrides_v: Cannot change colours for more than {VALUE:int} rides at a time.
popup_multiselect_recolourtoomanytracked: Cannot change colours for more than {VALUE:int} coasters, tracked rides, or flumes at a time.
popup_multiselect_recolourtoomanyvolumes: Cannot change colours for more than {VALUE:int} path/pool sections at a time.
popup_multiselect_toomanybuildings: Cannot Duplicate more than one building at a time.
popup_ride_carspertrainhint: Cannot edit trains or cars while ride is Open
popup_ride_carspertrainlimit: Increase the length of all stations to allow more cars to be added.
popup_ride_coasterfriction_hint: Apply a multiplier to the default friction for this coaster.
